vectors.name: empty-insufficient
vectors.description: No rmf_mapping or exposure_result supplied; finite-gate.

output_payload.statute_citation: Tex. Bus. & Com. Code §553.106 (TRAIGA affirmative defense), eff. 2026-01-01
output_payload.framing: evidence toward the statutory affirmative defense; not a guarantee the defense succeeds

vectors.name: eligible-substantial-coverage-clean
vectors.description: Substantial NIST RMF coverage band, no prohibited use; eligible for defense evidence.

output_payload.statute_citation: Tex. Bus. & Com. Code §553.106 (TRAIGA affirmative defense), eff. 2026-01-01
output_payload.framing: evidence toward the statutory affirmative defense; not a guarantee the defense succeeds

vectors.name: not-eligible-partial-band
vectors.description: Partial coverage band does not meet the substantial-compliance bar.

output_payload.framing: evidence toward the statutory affirmative defense; not a guarantee the defense succeeds

vectors.name: not-eligible-prohibited-use
vectors.description: Comprehensive RMF coverage but a prohibited use was detected upstream; not eligible.

output_payload.framing: evidence toward the statutory affirmative defense; not a guarantee the defense succeeds
